series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of information (agency names, employee names and titles, telephone and fax numbers, phone system features, voicemail instructions) for the State of Ohio phone directory.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office area/ phone system or file share for 1 year, then destroy/erase (State Archives to receive a copy of agency blue pages once a year). ; Paper: Retain in office area/ phone system or file share for 1 year, then destroy/erase (State Archives to receive a copy of agency blue pages once a year)., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
